consistency.rarity_and_attunement: Consistent. The description states 'Very Rare' and 'requires_attunement:true', which aligns with the source line 'Rod, very rare (requires [attunement])'.
consistency.mechanics_description: The three main properties ('Alertness', 'Spells', 'Protective Aura') are clearly delineated and described.
consistency.spell_links: The spell names are formatted as internal links (e.g., '[detect magic](#detect-magic)'), standard for documentation.

quality.clarity: High. The mechanical effects are precise (advantage on Perception/Initiative, specific spells, detailed area-of-effect for the aura).
quality.completeness: Complete. Covers activation times, durations (10 minutes for the aura), reuse restrictions (next dawn), and specific beneficiaries/targets for the aura.

alertness.effect: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Initiative rolls while held.

protective_aura.light_levels: 60 ft bright light, 60 ft dim light.
protective_aura.benefits: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws for self and allies in bright light.
protective_aura.detection: Senses invisible hostile creatures within the bright light.
protective_aura.duration: 10 minutes, or until pulled up (Action to stop).
